rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into the target component or implementation while preserving the original AADL structure.
generic_rules: Place interface-level contracts in component types; implementation-level bindings in component implementations.
Do not introduce new ports, data types, or property references not present in the input AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must use the syntax `annex agree {** ... **};` and must not contain AADL property names as variables.
Numeric range constraints must derive directly from requirements and match declared AGREE types.
anti_patterns: Do not assume numeric bounds (e.g., x >= 0) unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
Do not encode event ports as numeric or Boolean values without explicit data declarations in the model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
